PII_IN_LOGS.title: Security of processing
PII_IN_LOGS.requirement: Apply appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data confidentiality, integrity, availability, and resilience.
PII_IN_LOGS.max_penalty: Up to EUR 10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

API_OVEREXPOSURE.title: Data minimisation
API_OVEREXPOSURE.requirement: Ensure personal data is adequate, relevant, and limited to what is necessary for the processing purpose.
API_OVEREXPOSURE.max_penalty: Up to EUR 20,000,000 or 4% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

PII_OVEREXPOSED_IN_RESPONSE.title: Data minimisation
PII_OVEREXPOSED_IN_RESPONSE.requirement: Ensure personal data is adequate, relevant, and limited to what is necessary for the processing purpose.
PII_OVEREXPOSED_IN_RESPONSE.max_penalty: Up to EUR 20,000,000 or 4% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

MISSING_AUTH.title: Data protection by design and by default
MISSING_AUTH.summary: Data protection by design and by default
MISSING_AUTH.requirement: Build controls that ensure only necessary personal data is processed and exposed by default.
MISSING_AUTH.max_penalty: Up to EUR 10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

THIRD_PARTY_PII_WITHOUT_CONSENT.title: Lawfulness of processing
THIRD_PARTY_PII_WITHOUT_CONSENT.requirement: Process or disclose personal data only when a valid lawful basis applies.
THIRD_PARTY_PII_WITHOUT_CONSENT.max_penalty: Up to EUR 20,000,000 or 4% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

STACK_TRACE_LEAKAGE.title: Security of processing
STACK_TRACE_LEAKAGE.requirement: Prevent accidental disclosure of personal data or system details through appropriate security measures.
STACK_TRACE_LEAKAGE.max_penalty: Up to EUR 10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

ERROR_DISCLOSURE.title: Security of processing
ERROR_DISCLOSURE.requirement: Prevent accidental disclosure of personal data or system details through appropriate security measures.
ERROR_DISCLOSURE.max_penalty: Up to EUR 10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

MISSING_RETENTION_POLICY.title: Storage limitation
MISSING_RETENTION_POLICY.requirement: Keep personal data in identifiable form only for as long as necessary for the processing purpose.
MISSING_RETENTION_POLICY.max_penalty: Up to EUR 20,000,000 or 4% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

MISSING_RETENTION_BOUNDARY.title: Storage limitation
MISSING_RETENTION_BOUNDARY.requirement: Keep personal data in identifiable form only for as long as necessary for the processing purpose.
MISSING_RETENTION_BOUNDARY.max_penalty: Up to EUR 20,000,000 or 4% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

PERMISSIVE_CORS.title: Security of processing
PERMISSIVE_CORS.requirement: Apply technical controls that reduce unauthorised access and disclosure risk.
PERMISSIVE_CORS.max_penalty: Up to EUR 10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

HARDCODED_SECRET.title: Security of processing
HARDCODED_SECRET.requirement: Protect systems and credentials that secure personal data using appropriate technical controls.
HARDCODED_SECRET.max_penalty: Up to EUR 10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

SQL_INJECTION.title: Security of processing
SQL_INJECTION.requirement: Protect processing systems from unauthorised access, disclosure, and compromise.
SQL_INJECTION.max_penalty: Up to EUR 10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.

PLAINTEXT_PASSWORD_STORAGE.title: Security of processing
PLAINTEXT_PASSWORD_STORAGE.requirement: Protect credentials and personal data confidentiality with appropriate security measures.
PLAINTEXT_PASSWORD_STORAGE.max_penalty: Up to EUR 10,000,000 or 2% of total worldwide annual turnover, whichever is higher.
